title: Visual Identity Guidelines
scenario: Develop a set of visual identity guidelines for a new brand, including color palette, typography, and logo requirements. The guidelines should be concise and easy to follow.
constraints: Must include a color palette with 3 main colors

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the visual identity guidelines meet the color palette and typography constraints
Evaluate if the guidelines are clear and easy to follow
Check if the guidelines are correctly formatted and use standard design terminology
